title: Darkster Epic Guns / TACZ + EPICFIGHT
description: this datapack makes timeless and classics zero compatible with epic fight mod!
body:
## 🔎 Overview:
- This mod adds compatibility for [TACZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero) and [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight).
- Aiming, walking and running animations!
- timeless and classics addons is also suported.

## 📑 Known issues: 
- first person locked in battle mode: use the [Epic Tweaks Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-tweaks) and enable "filter first person" 
- YOU HAVE TO USE EMBEDDIUM + OCULUS!
